item.title: Virtualization
item.description: Bridge configuration /etc/networking/interfaces # This file describes the network interfaces available on your system # and how to activate them. For more information, see interfaces(5). source /etc/network/interfaces.d/* # The loopback network interface auto lo br0 iface lo inet loopback iface enp0s31f6 inet manual iface br0 inet static bridge_ports enp0s31f6 address 10.0.10.100 broadcast 10.0.10.255 netmask 255.255.255.0 gateway 10.0.10.254 bridge_stp off # disable Spanning Tree Protocol bridge_waitport 0 # no delay before a port becomes available bridge_fd 0 # no forwarding delay bridge_ports none # if you do not want to bind to any ports bridge_ports regex eth* # use a regular expression to define ports Enable forwarding Install apt install \ libvirt-daemon \ qemu-kvm \ virt-manager

item.title: k9s
item.description: version='0.24.2' url="https://github.com/derailed/k9s/releases/download/v${version}/k9s_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz" wget $url -O k9s.tar.gz tar -zxvf k9s.tar.gz k9s sudo mv k9s /usr/local/bin rm k9s.tar.gz

item.title: Go
item.description: version="1.15.6" wget https://golang.org/dl/go${version}.linux-amd64.tar.gz -O go.tar.gz tar -xvf go.tar.gz sudo mv go /usr/local rm go.tar.gz mkdir -p ~/go/bin Add environment variables export GOROOT=/usr/local/go export GOPATH=~/go export PATH=$GOPATH/bin:$GOROOT/bin:$PATH

item.title: zsh
item.description: Install apt install zsh zsh-syntax-highlighting My theme Download https://github.com/saltera/my-zsh-theme/blob/master/my.zsh-theme to $ZSH/custom/themes/my.zsh-theme # vim:ft=zsh ts=2 sw=2 sts=2 # # My theme is a slightly customized agnoster - https://gist.github.com/3712874 # A Powerline-inspired theme for ZSH # # # README # # In order for this theme to render correctly, you will need a # [Powerline-patched font](https://github.com/Lokaltog/powerline-fonts). # Make sure you have a recent version: the code points that Powerline # uses changed in 2012, and older versions will display incorrectly, # in confusing ways.

item.title: Packages (third party)
item.description: Azure CLI curl -sL https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc \ | gpg --dearmor \ | tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/microsoft.gpg > /dev/null AZ_REPO=$(lsb_release -cs) echo "deb [arch=amd64] https://packages.microsoft.com/repos/azure-cli/ $AZ_REPOmain" \ | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/azure-cli.list apt update apt install azure-cli Docker curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/debian/gpg \ | apt-key add - add-apt-repository "deb [arch=amd64] https://download.docker.com/linux/debian $(lsb_release -cs)stable" apt update apt install docker-ce usermod -aG docker ${USER} su - ${USER} Disable zfs plugin in /etc/containerd/config.toml disabled_plugins = ["cri", "zfs"] GitHub CLI apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.

item.title: Gnome extensions
item.description: Install the gnome-shell-extensions package. apt update apt install gnome-shell-extensions Activate packages on https://extensions.gnome.org No top left hot corner Sound output device chooser Todo txt

item.title: Appearance
item.description: Change the theme to Adwaita-dark gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.interface gtk-theme "Adwaita-dark"

item.title: Audioengine HD3
item.description: The Audioengine HD3 speakers do not appear to support a sample rate of 44.1kHz which is the default. We therefore need change the sample rate to 48kHz and restart pulseaudio. sed \ -i 's/; default-sample-rate = 44100/default-sample-rate = 48000/g' \ /etc/pulse/daemon.conf pulseaudio -k

item.title: Packages
item.description: Install main Name Description bridge-utils Utilities for configuring the Linux Ethernet bridge dnsutils Clients provided with BIND gimp git htop interactive processes viewer inkscape hwinfo Hardware identification system openssh-server pavucontrol tree displays an indented directory tree, in color apt update apt install \ apt-transport-https \ bridge-utils \ ca-certificates \ curl \ dnsutils \ gimp \ git \ gnupg \ gnupg2 \ htop \ hwinfo \ inkscape \ lsb-release \ mc \ openssh-server \ pavucontrol \ software-properties-common \ tree \ yq Insall Non-free apt install \ gstreamer1.

item.title: Dell XPS 15 9560
item.description: Installer missing non-free wifi firmware The Intel 8265/8275 requires non-free firmware whoever this can be added to the installation media. Copy the non-free firmware-iwlwifi_*_all.deb from https://cdimage.debian.org/cdimage/unofficial/non-free/firmware/ to firmware folder of the installation media. ACPI issue There is currently a bug that means that some kernels (particularly newer ones) will detect the wrong ACPI revision. Add acpi_rev_override=5 to /etc/default/grub GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX="acpi_rev_override=5 quiet" Update grub update-grub Reference Name Link Debian XPS 15 9560 https://wiki.
